hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ]; then exit 0; fi; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE_PATH"); case "$BASENAME" in .env|users.json|*.pem|*.key) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files" >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.env.*|*credentials*) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git add (-A|--all|\.)$|^git add .* (-A|--all)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never use git add -A/. — always add specific files by name" >&2; exit 2; fi; for PAT in ".env" "users.json" "credentials" ".pem" ".key"; do case "$CMD" in *"$PAT"*) case "$CMD" in *cat*|*less*|*head*|*tail*|*grep*|*echo*) ;; *) echo "BLOCKED: Cannot modify secrets/env files via shell" >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac; done; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit"; then if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\[CD\]|\[Donna\]|\[Marko\]|\[auto\]"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message must contain [CD], [Donna], [Marko], or [auto] prefix" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); LOGDIR=".claude"; mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"; echo "$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | $CLAUDE_TOOL | $FILE_PATH" >> "$LOGDIR/change-log.txt"; exit 0'
